description: An 8-minute workout pairing an ascending handstand push-up ladder with an unevenly stepped clean ladder at one fixed heavy weight.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/open/2015/4 (official CrossFit Games Open workout), retrieved 2026-07-09; handstand push-ups increase by 3 reps every round; clean reps increase by 3 every 3rd round; pattern continues indefinitely until the 8-minute cap
